Muc tieu: Giam tai CSKH va phan hoi 24/7
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Chatbot AI tren website/kenh chat; tra loi cau hoi thuong gap; tu van thong tin san pham/chinh sach; phan loai nhu cau khach hang; thu lead; chuyen nguoi that khi can; luu lich su hoi thoai.
Input du lieu can co: FAQ; chinh sach giao hang/doi tra/bao hanh; danh sach san pham; thong tin lien he; kich ban CSKH.
Output/Ket qua: Hoi thoai tu dong; lead moi; giam luong inbox lap lai; tang toc do phan hoi.
Pham vi trien khai: Website chatbot; knowledge base; lead form; dashboard co ban.
Ghi chu: Chua bao gom Zalo/Messenger neu khong yeu cau them.

Muc tieu: Tang ty le chot don bang tu van san pham thong minh
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Phan tich nhu cau khach; goi y san pham phu hop; so sanh san pham; de xuat upsell/cross-sell; gui link san pham; hoi them ngan sach, dien tich, nhu cau su dung; khuyen khich de lai so dien thoai de tu van.
Input du lieu can co: Danh sach san pham; gia; thuoc tinh san pham; ton kho co ban; danh muc; du lieu nhu cau khach hang.
Output/Ket qua: Goi y 3-5 san pham phu hop; tang chat luong tu van; tang co hoi chot sale.
Pham vi trien khai: Website chatbot; product database; logic tim kiem san pham; product suggestion.
Ghi chu: Phu hop website thuong mai dien tu/ban le/co catalog san pham.

Muc tieu: Tu dong hoa quy trinh ban hang va follow-up lead
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Quan ly pipeline lead; tu dong gan trang thai lead; nhac lich follow-up; gui email/Zalo/Messenger nuoi duong lead; dong bo lich su cham soc vao CRM; canh bao lead nong cho nhan vien.
Input du lieu can co: CRM; danh sach lead; email system; kenh cham soc; quy trinh sales hien tai.
Output/Ket qua: Lead duoc phan loai; lead khong bi bo sot; tang toc do xu ly va follow-up.
Pham vi trien khai: CRM integration; automation workflow; lead scoring co ban.
Ghi chu: Can API hoac kha nang tich hop voi CRM/kenh lien lac hien tai.

Muc tieu: Ho tro doi marketing san xuat noi dung nhanh hon va toi uu hon
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Tao bai viet marketing; viet email campaign; goi y noi dung landing page; tao prompt cho video/image; ho tro y tuong chay ads; phan tich thong diep theo doi tuong muc tieu.
Input du lieu can co: Brand guideline; thong tin san pham; chan dung khach hang; muc tieu chien dich.
Output/Ket qua: Noi dung marketing nhanh hon; giam thoi gian san xuat; tang toc do ra chien dich.
Pham vi trien khai: Prompt library; content workflow; API AI neu can.
Ghi chu: Khong bao gom dich vu media buying neu khong co pham vi rieng.

Muc tieu: Toi uu hieu qua chien dich marketing dua tren du lieu
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Phan tich CPC/CPA/ROI; de xuat toi uu ngan sach; goi y doi tuong quang cao; theo doi hieu qua noi dung; goi y dieu chinh chien dich marketing automation.
Input du lieu can co: Du lieu quang cao; pixel/analytics; email performance; social metrics.
Output/Ket qua: Bao cao toi uu; de xuat dieu chinh chien dich; tang hieu qua su dung ngan sach.
Pham vi trien khai: Marketing analytics; dashboard; de xuat toi uu.
Ghi chu: Can quyen truy cap nguon du lieu marketing.

Nhom giai phap: Ho tro quan ly van hanh va phan tich du lieu
Muc tieu: Tong hop du lieu doanh nghiep de ho tro ra quyet dinh
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Tong hop doanh thu/don hang; dashboard co ban; phan tich hanh vi mua hang; thong ke tan suat mua; ho so khach hang 360 do; ket noi Sales/Marketing/CSKH.
Input du lieu can co: CRM; website; marketing data; sales data; ERP/Data warehouse neu co.
Output/Ket qua: Dashboard tong hop; insight ve khach hang; ho tro ra quyet dinh nhanh hon.
Pham vi trien khai: Dashboard; data pipeline co ban; bao cao tong hop.
Ghi chu: Can nguon du lieu on dinh va duoc cap quyen truy cap.

Nhom giai phap: Ho tro quan ly van hanh va phan tich du lieu
Muc tieu: Du bao xu huong kinh doanh va goi y chien luoc
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Du bao doanh thu thang/quy; du doan nhu cau thi truong; goi y san pham nen day manh; goi y thi truong/phan khuc nen mo rong; canh bao som bien dong kinh doanh.
Input du lieu can co: Du lieu lich su kinh doanh; doanh thu; san pham; xu huong thi truong; kho du lieu.
Output/Ket qua: Bao cao du bao; canh bao xu huong; ho tro lap ke hoach kinh doanh.
Pham vi trien khai: Forecasting model; dashboard; bao cao chien luoc.
Ghi chu: Phu hop doanh nghiep da co du lieu lich su kha day du.

Muc tieu: Giai phap MVP de doanh nghiep bat dau nhanh
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Gom chatbot website, FAQ/knowledge base, thu lead, dashboard co ban, handoff cho nhan vien. Phu hop SME muon giam tai CSKH va co kenh tu van tu dong.
Input du lieu can co: FAQ; san pham/chinh sach co ban; website.
Output/Ket qua: Chatbot hoat dong tren website; co lead; co lich su trao doi.
Pham vi trien khai: 1 website; 1 admin co ban; 1 nguon du lieu.
Ghi chu: Goi de ban de nhat va de demo nhat.

Muc tieu: Giai phap tang truong doanh thu va toi uu tu van
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Gom Starter + tu van san pham thong minh + product suggestion + lead automation co ban + dashboard tot hon. Phu hop doanh nghiep da co luong lead va muon tang ty le chot sale.
Input du lieu can co: San pham; thuoc tinh san pham; quy trinh sales co ban; website.
Output/Ket qua: Tang chat luong tu van; tang co hoi chot sale; giam bo sot lead.
Pham vi trien khai: Website + san pham + lead flow + admin nang cao.
Ghi chu: Rat hop voi website ban le/dien may/ecommerce.

Muc tieu: Giai phap tong the da kenh va du lieu cho doanh nghiep lon
Mo ta chuc nang chi tiet: Gom Growth + CRM integration + marketing analytics + data intelligence + workflow automation + bao cao cho van hanh. Phu hop doanh nghiep can giai phap AI tong the.
Input du lieu can co: Nhieu nguon du lieu; CRM; marketing; sales; CSKH.
Output/Ket qua: He thong AI ho tro nhieu phong ban; bao cao tong hop; workflow lien phong ban.
Pham vi trien khai: Multi-channel; CRM; dashboard; automation nang cao.
Ghi chu: Bao gia tuy bien theo pham vi va muc tich hop.
